algorithm_summary: Document how the participant identifier is created.
assumptions: Replace the placeholder source columns and expression before use.

algorithm_summary: Document how wave is defined or derived.
assumptions: Use `NA_character_` only if the dataset is truly cross-sectional.

algorithm_summary: Document how age is measured or derived.
assumptions: Use `NA_real_` only when age cannot yet be harmonised.

algorithm_summary: Document the inline recode or other derivation used for sex/gender harmonisation.
assumptions: Prefer inline `dplyr::recode()` for short one-off mappings.
notes: Use `lookup_table` only when the mapping is too large to read comfortably inline.
